'''thamubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smallishness|smallishness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-m-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smallishness|smallishness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thamubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæmibith|thæmibith]] || [[word:thæmibij|thæmibij]] || [[word:thæmibish|thæmibish]] || [[word:thæmibi|thæmibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thamumubuth|thamumubuth]] || [[word:thamumubuj|thamumubuj]] || [[word:thamumubush|thamumubush]] || [[word:thamumubu|thamumubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamubuth|thamubuth]] || [[word:thamubuj|thamubuj]] || [[word:thamubush|thamubush]] || [[word:thamubu|thamubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamufbuth|thamufbuth]] || [[word:thamufbuj|thamufbuj]] || [[word:thamufbush|thamufbush]] || [[word:thamufbuf|thamufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thamubuthu|thamubuthu]] || [[word:thamubuju|thamubuju]] || [[word:thamubushu|thamubushu]] || [[word:thamubuku|thamubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thamubuth|thamubuth]] || [[word:thamubuj|thamubuj]] || [[word:thamubush|thamubush]] || [[word:thamubu|thamubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thamubuthul|thamubuthul]] || [[word:thamubujul|thamubujul]] || [[word:thamubushul|thamubushul]] || [[word:thamubukul|thamubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thamubuthuthu|thamubuthuthu]] || [[word:thamubujuju|thamubujuju]] || [[word:thamubushushu|thamubushushu]] || [[word:thamubuku|thamubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thamubuthun|thamubuthun]] || [[word:thamubujun|thamubujun]] || [[word:thamubushun|thamubushun]] || [[word:thamubukun|thamubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thamubuthuoro|thamubuthuoro]] || [[word:thamubujuoro|thamubujuoro]] || [[word:thamubushuoro|thamubushuoro]] || [[word:thamubukuoro|thamubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
